title: Create trigger when file uploaded to Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: zeusdo (Dana Olson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to create an integration when a file is uploaded to Monday.com it will trigger an event and upload the file(s) to Dropbox.
I’d like to go one step further and depending on which user sent the file it will upload to that user’s Dropbox account.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @zeusdo

Welcome to the Community! At upstream, we’re not just Platinum Partners of monday.com, but also an award-winning dev team who specialise in custom integrations. We can certainly look to assist you in building out exactly what you need.

Feel free to reach me via the below details or book a chat straight away for when it suits.

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @zeusdo

Thanks for reaching out to the community! You can find a list of ways to integrate monday.com and Dropbox. By using the intuitive integration, you can now efficiently manage your projects by automating folder creation in Dropbox whenever a new folder is added to a board on monday.com. This approach helps you keep your virtual workspace systematized, allowing you to easily identify relevant files and focus on directing tasks to completion.

If you want to integrate monday.com and Dropbox, collaborating with experienced monday.com integrations experts is the right choice. These experts enhance your productivity and eliminate manual activities by implementing a seamless workflow between Dropbox and monday.com.
